name: CONSUMER PORTFOLIO SERVICES, INC.
business: Consumer Portfolio Services, Inc. purchases and services retail automobile contracts originated by franchised and independent dealers, providing indirect financing to sub-prime customers with limited credit histories or past credit problems.
sellsTo: sub-prime customers (limited credit histories or past credit problems)

exposures.sentence: Our business is to purchase and service retail automobile contracts originated primarily by franchised automobile dealers and, to a lesser extent, by select independent dealers in the United States in the sale of new and used automobiles, light trucks and passenger vans.
We use artificial intelligence (AI) in certain aspects of our business operations, and we or our third-party service providers may expand the use of these technologies in the future.
A Breach in the Security of Our Systems Could Result in the Disclosure of Confidential Information, Subject us to Liability.

catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we entered into a new $167.5 million facility.
On March 20, 2025, we completed a residual interest financing of our residual interests from previously issued securitizations in the amount of $65.0 million.
In January 2026, we completed another securitization with $345.6 million of notes sold.
